title: War in Iran Gives New Fuel to a Tax Debate in Australia

title: A Lost Tribe in India Makes Its Exodus to Israel
description: The B’nei Menashe believe they are the children of Manasseh, a king of Judah exiled about 2,800 years ago. Evidence is thin, but Israel is welcoming them ‘home.’

title: Rectal cancer deaths rising rapidly among millennials: 'It's a medical crisis'
description: Deaths from rectal cancer are rising rapidly among younger adults, an alarming trend that is confounding scientists trying to understand why millennials are so hard-hit.

title: Man who pleaded guilty to raping 12-year-old relative is illegal immigrant from Honduras, DHS says

title: Amed Rosario, Ryan McMahon’s strengths prove key in Yankees’ win
